mano_cua.result_summary: SVG骨架屏缺少所有无障碍属性：无<title>元素、aria-labelledby为null、无aria-label、无role属性。Storybook无Knobs面板无法测试自定义title prop。明显的无障碍bug
mano_cua.last_reasoning: SVG ContentLoader missing all accessibility attributes: no <title> element found, aria-labelledby: null, no aria-label, no role. SVG only has viewBox and preserveAspectRatio attributes. Clear accessibility bug.
